summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vacaciones and Días Libres functionality. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) and frontend UI features working correctly. The calendar module properly manages both vacation days and free days with full CRUD operations and counter updates.
seed_data_creation: Used existing operarios Daniel and Vanesa for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All días libres functionality is working. Backend endpoint /api/vacaciones/resumen returns all 6 counter fields (dias_disponibles, dias_disfrutados, dias_restantes for vacaciones AND dias_libres_disponibles, dias_libres_disfrutados, dias_libres_restantes for días libres). Frontend summary table displays 7 columns correctly. Mode switching between Vacaciones and Día Libre works. Slot marking updates counters in real-time.

summary_table.details: Table shows 7 columns: Operario, Vacaciones (Disponibles, Disfrutados, Restantes), Días Libres (Disponibles, Disfrutados, Restantes)

vacaciones_input.details: Input for modifying días de vacaciones disponibles works and updates resumen correctly

dias_libres_input.details: Input for modifying días libres disponibles works and updates resumen correctly

slot_marking_libre.details: Marking slot with 'Día Libre' mode increments dias_libres_disfrutados and decrements restantes

slot_marking_vacacion.details: Marking slot with 'Vacaciones' mode increments dias_disfrutados and decrements restantes

gestionar_operarios_modal.details: Modal shows días de vacaciones and días libres for each operario

nuevo_operario_form.details: Form has field for días libres with default value of 6
